purpose: Silky, lustrous hair result closeup after treatment — shine and texture focus without requiring face. Used by salons and haircare product brands.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Extreme hair texture beauty photography showing {hair_type} hair with {treatment_result} — silky smooth and glass-like reflective shine, hyper-realistic individual strand detail, clean separated healthy hair strands falling naturally, {lighting_descriptor} lighting creating ribbon-like highlight along hair length, neutral or gradient background, hair shown from crown downward without head or face required, water-repelling surface sheen suggesting deep conditioning result, shot on 85mm at f/2.8, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: face or full head (no hijab compliance needed if face excluded)
Avoid in output: frizzy or damaged-looking hair (must look treated and healthy)
notes: Intents: grow, harvest. Saudi adaptation guidance: Hair content is highly sensitive for Saudi female accounts — face-free hair content (strand closeup, behind-head angle, pooled hair on surface) bypasses modesty concerns entirely while still being aspirational. Most Saudi hair salons use this framing. Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per week for hair care brands. Compliance level: standard.
